description: Fix 29 verified critical and 62 important issues. 35 stories in 6 waves, split into 8 independent worktree groups for parallel execution.

WT1.name: Config & Platform
WT1.softConflict: WT8 (F03 Sentry touches next.config.js — merge-friendly, different sections)

WT2.name: Cron Routes
WT2.internalOrder: US-A01 THEN US-E03 (auth fix before parallelization)

WT3.name: Repository Layer
WT3.softConflict: WT4 (D02-D04 touch intervention.repository.ts — different methods, merge-friendly)

WT4.name: Intervention Domain
WT4.softConflict: WT3 (B05 touches intervention.repository.ts search method — different section)

WT8.name: Frontend Quality
WT8.softConflict: WT1 (F03 Sentry touches next.config.js + package.json — merge-friendly)

userStories.title: Fix cron auth bypass (5 routes)
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I want cron endpoints to reject unauthenticated requests when CRON_SECRET is unset.
acceptanceCriteria: 5 cron routes use fail-closed: if (!process.env.CRON_SECRET || authHeader !== ...)
tests: Unit test: each route returns 401 when CRON_SECRET env is unset
Unit test: each route returns 401 when Authorization header is missing
Unit test: each route returns 401 when Authorization header has wrong value
Unit test: each route returns 200 when CRON_SECRET set and header matches

userStories.title: Add missing security headers (HSTS + Permissions-Policy)
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want proper HTTP security headers.
acceptanceCriteria: next.config.js includes Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), browsing-topics=()
tests: Unit test: parse next.config.js headers array, assert HSTS and Permissions-Policy present with correct values
Smoke test: curl -I localhost:3000 | grep Strict-Transport-Security

userStories.title: Remove service role key from logs
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want no portion of the service role key logged.
acceptanceCriteria: supabase-client.ts no longer logs keyPrefix, keySuffix, or keyLength
tests: Unit test: mock logger, call createServiceRoleSupabaseClient(), assert log output contains keyPresent:true but NOT keyPrefix/keySuffix/keyLength

userStories.title: Fix LotRepository.findOccupied() wrong role
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the occupied lots query to return correct results.
tests: Integration test: create lot with locataire contact, call findOccupied(), assert lot appears in results
Integration test: findVacant() still works (uses correct 'locataire' already)
userStories.notes: Live bug — currently always returns empty | Implemented 2026-03-12

userStories.title: Fix open redirect in impersonation callback
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want the impersonation callback to reject external redirect URLs.
acceptanceCriteria: next parameter validated: must start with / and not start with //
Impersonation flow works for all role dashboards
tests: Unit test: next='https://evil.com' -> redirects to /gestionnaire/dashboard
Unit test: next='//evil.com' -> redirects to /gestionnaire/dashboard
Unit test: next='/locataire/dashboard' -> redirects to /locataire/dashboard
Unit test: next=undefined -> redirects to /gestionnaire/dashboard

userStories.title: Fix XSS in email send route + add Zod validation
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want email composition safe from HTML injection.
acceptanceCriteria: Zod schema validates to, subject, body, cc fields
Invalid input returns 400 with generic error
tests: Unit test: body '<script>alert(1)</script>' -> escaped to <script>

Unit test: body with newlines ->
replacement still works post-escaping
Unit test: invalid email in 'to' -> 400 response
Unit test: missing 'subject' -> 400 response
Unit test: valid input -> 200 response

userStories.title: Add auth to dispatcher actions
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want dispatcher-actions to verify caller authentication.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns early if auth is null
Existing internal callers continue to work
tests: Unit test: unauthenticated call returns early without dispatching
Integration test: authenticated call dispatches notifications normally
Regression test: intervention creation flow still triggers notifications end-to-end
userStories.notes: Test ALL notification dispatch flows | Implemented 2026-03-12

userStories.title: Secure document download with signed tokens
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want document download links to use signed tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: Email links include HMAC-signed token (document_id + expiration)
Download route validates HMAC before serving
Token expires after configurable TTL (24h default)
Backward-compatible: existing UUID-only links still work during migration period
tests: Unit test: HMAC signing produces valid token
Unit test: HMAC verification rejects tampered token
Unit test: expired token rejected with 401
Unit test: valid token serves file with 200
Unit test: rate limit triggers after N requests from same IP
Integration test: email notification includes signed URL
Regression test: existing UUID-only download still works (migration period)
userStories.notes: Standalone worktree — complex, must preserve email link UX | Implemented 2026-03-12

userStories.title: Standardize PostgREST search sanitization
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want all search queries to sanitize user input.
acceptanceCriteria: Search works with normal characters (letters, spaces, accents)
tests: Unit test: sanitizeSearch('normal text') -> 'normal text'
Unit test: sanitizeSearch('test,id.neq.0') -> 'testidneq0'
Unit test: sanitizeSearch('cafe au lait') -> preserved (accents OK)
Unit test: sanitizeSearch('') -> ''
Integration test: search 'Jean' in contacts -> returns results
Integration test: search 'test,id.neq.0' -> no filter injection, safe results

userStories.title: Remove debug info from error responses
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want error responses to never contain internal details.
acceptanceCriteria: reset-password: no debugInfo, no error details, no email list logging
tests: Unit test: reset-password error response has no 'debugInfo' key
Unit test: reset-password error response has no 'details' key with Supabase message
Unit test: change-password error response is generic string only
Unit test: change-email error response is generic string only
Unit test: no console.log/logger.info with user email list in reset-password

userStories.title: Derive team_id server-side in upload route
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want the upload route to derive team_id from authenticated profile.
acceptanceCriteria: property-documents/upload route gets team_id from authenticated profile
Storage path and DB insert use server-derived team_id
tests: Unit test: team_id from FormData is ignored, server-derived value used instead
Integration test: upload document as gestionnaire, verify team_id matches user's team
Regression test: upload flow still works end-to-end

userStories.title: Set up GitHub Actions CI pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I want automated lint checking on every PR.
acceptanceCriteria: .github/workflows/ci.yml runs npm run lint on push/PR
Pipeline status visible in GitHub PR checks
tests: Manual test: push PR, verify CI runs and shows green check
Manual test: introduce lint error, verify CI fails

userStories.title: CSP report-only mode
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want CSP violations collected before enforcing stricter policy.
acceptanceCriteria: Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only header added with stricter policy
Violations reported to logging endpoint or console
tests: Unit test: next.config.js headers include Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only
Manual test: browse app, check browser DevTools for CSP violations logged
Regression test: all third-party scripts (Contentsquare, Frill, Maps) still load

userStories.title: Pin @vercel/analytics version
userStories.description: As a developer, I want reproducible builds.
tests: Unit test: grep package.json for 'latest' -> no matches in dependencies
Manual test: npm install twice -> lockfile unchanged

userStories.title: Split impersonation cookie for httpOnly
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want the impersonation JWT to be httpOnly.
acceptanceCriteria: impersonation-token cookie set with httpOnly: true
is-impersonating boolean cookie with httpOnly: false for banner
tests: Unit test: startImpersonation sets two cookies with correct httpOnly flags
Unit test: stopImpersonation clears both cookies
Integration test: impersonation banner visible after start
Integration test: banner disappears after stop
Regression test: full impersonate -> act -> stop flow works

userStories.title: Dependency hygiene cleanup
userStories.description: As a developer, I want dependencies properly categorized.
acceptanceCriteria: No-op webpack override removed from next.config.js
tests: Unit test: @radix-ui/react-toast not in package.json
Unit test: @types/* packages in devDependencies not dependencies
Unit test: pino-pretty in devDependencies
Unit test: dotenv in devDependencies
Manual test: npm install succeeds
Manual test: npm run build succeeds (no missing runtime deps)

userStories.title: Fix StatsRepository nonexistent columns
userStories.description: As an admin, I want accurate intervention counts per user.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns correct counts for gestionnaires and prestataires
tests: Integration test: create interventions with assignments, call getUserStats(), verify counts match
Integration test: gestionnaire stats count interventions where assigned as gestionnaire
Integration test: prestataire stats count interventions where assigned as prestataire

userStories.title: Harmonize VALID_TRANSITIONS (service + repository)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single source of truth for status transitions.
acceptanceCriteria: Repository VALID_TRANSITIONS aligned with service version
demande_de_devis and en_cours removed from repository
tests: Unit test: repository VALID_TRANSITIONS keys match service VALID_TRANSITIONS keys exactly
Unit test: no reference to 'demande_de_devis' or 'en_cours' in transition maps
Unit test: 'contestee' has valid transitions defined
Integration test: status transition demande->approuvee works for gestionnaire
Integration test: status transition approuvee->planification works
Integration test: status transition planifiee->cloturee_par_prestataire works
Regression test: all 9 active statuses reachable through valid paths
userStories.notes: Test ALL workflow transitions for all roles | Implemented 2026-03-12

userStories.title: Fix getDocuments() missing deleted_at filter
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want soft-deleted documents hidden.
tests: Integration test: soft-delete document, call getDocuments(), assert document NOT in results
Integration test: non-deleted documents still returned
Regression test: getDocumentsByInterventionIds() still filters correctly

userStories.title: Fix findByBuilding() to include building-level interventions
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want building-level interventions visible in building views.
acceptanceCriteria: Query captures both lot_id IN (lotIds) AND building_id = buildingId
tests: Integration test: create intervention with building_id set, lot_id NULL, call findByBuilding(), assert it appears
Integration test: lot-level interventions still appear
Regression test: building view shows both lot-level and building-level interventions

userStories.title: Fix UserRepository role enum values
userStories.description: As a developer, I want correct French role names in validation.
tests: Unit test: validate() accepts 'gestionnaire' (not 'manager')
Unit test: validate() accepts 'locataire' (not 'tenant')
Unit test: validate() accepts 'prestataire' (not 'provider')
Unit test: validate() accepts 'proprietaire'
Unit test: validate() rejects 'manager', 'tenant', 'provider'
userStories.notes: Currently dead code but prevents future trap | Implemented 2026-03-12

userStories.title: Consolidate duplicate validation functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want consistent validation utilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Single source in error-handler.ts with ValidationException
tests: Unit test: validateRequired throws ValidationException (not plain Error)
Unit test: validateEmail accepts valid emails, rejects invalid
Unit test: validateUUID accepts v1 through v5 UUIDs
Unit test: no validateRequired/validateEmail/validateUUID exports from service-types.ts
Regression test: all repositories compile (vitest list)

userStories.title: Parallelize import service entity loops
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want large imports to complete in seconds.
acceptanceCriteria: Entity loops use Promise.allSettled with chunks of 10
tests: Unit test: chunkArray(items, 10) produces correct chunks
Unit test: importBuildings processes items in parallel batches
Integration test: import 50 buildings, verify all created
Integration test: import with 1 bad entity, verify others still created (partial failure)
Integration test: inter-phase order: companies before contacts before buildings before lots
Performance test: 350 entities completes in < 10 seconds
userStories.notes: Keep inter-phase order, only parallelize intra-phase | Implemented 2026-03-12

userStories.title: Parallelize contract creation post-steps
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want contract creation to be faster.
acceptanceCriteria: After contacts: docs + interventions + reminders in Promise.all
tests: Integration test: create contract with contacts + docs + interventions + reminders, all created
Regression test: contract creation flow still works end-to-end
Regression test: contacts are linked before interventions (dependency order)

userStories.title: Parallelize 3 cron sequential loops
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I want cron jobs to process subscriptions faster.
acceptanceCriteria: Each cron logs processed count and failures
tests: Unit test: trial-expiration processes 10 subs in parallel, all updated
Unit test: trial-notifications processes 3 windows in parallel
Unit test: behavioral-triggers parallelizes admin email + intervention count fetch
Unit test: partial email failure doesn't stop other subscriptions
Regression test: existing cron unit tests still pass
userStories.notes: Auth fix (A01) must be done first. Watch Resend rate limits. | Implemented 2026-03-12

userStories.title: Add after() to 3 routes for notification deferral
userStories.description: As a user, I want faster API responses.
acceptanceCriteria: intervention-finalize: in-app notifs + activity log in after()
tests: Unit test: work-completion route returns response before notification call
Unit test: intervention-finalize defers in-app notifications
Unit test: intervention-schedule defers in-app notifications
Regression test: notifications are delivered (check DB after request)
Regression test: activity logs are written (check DB after request)

userStories.title: Parallelize service init in 2 routes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want faster API route cold starts.
tests: Unit test: all 6 services initialized after Promise.all
Regression test: intervention-schedule route works end-to-end
Regression test: intervention-finalize route works end-to-end

userStories.title: Activate or remove dead cache layer
userStories.description: As a developer, I want cache infrastructure either working or deleted.
tests: If activated: Unit test — cached function returns same data on 2nd call (cache hit)
If activated: Unit test — revalidateTag clears cache, next call hits DB
If deleted: grep for 'cached-queries' returns 0 matches
If deleted: grep for dead revalidateTag calls returns 0 matches
Regression test: pages still load data correctly

userStories.title: Extract shared ALLOWED_MIME_TYPES
userStories.description: As a developer, I want consistent upload validation.
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 definition sites import from shared constant
tests: Unit test: ALLOWED_MIME_TYPES includes pdf, jpg, png, doc, docx
Unit test: AUDIO_MIME_TYPES variant includes mp3, wav (intervention-specific)
Regression test: upload PDF works, upload exe rejected

userStories.title: Add loading.tsx to 16 bare route segments
userStories.description: As a user, I want loading indicators during navigation.
tests: E2E test: navigate to 3 sample routes, verify skeleton appears before content
Lint: all new loading.tsx files pass

userStories.title: Set up Sentry error tracking
userStories.description: As a developer, I want production errors reported to Sentry.
acceptanceCriteria: Error boundaries send errors to Sentry
tests: Unit test: Sentry.init called with correct DSN and environment
Manual test: trigger error, verify appears in Sentry dashboard
Manual test: source maps resolve to original source
userStories.notes: Soft conflict with WT1 on next.config.js — merge-friendly | Implemented 2026-03-12

userStories.title: Add /api/health endpoint
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I want a health check endpoint.
tests: Unit test: GET /api/health returns 200 with { status: 'ok', timestamp: ISO }
Unit test: response time < 200ms
Unit test: no auth header required

userStories.title: Remove test/debug pages from production
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want test pages inaccessible in production.
tests: Unit test: route file has NODE_ENV guard OR file deleted
Manual test: /gestionnaire/test-property-preview returns 404 in production

userStories.title: Fix userScalable accessibility
userStories.description: As a user with visual impairments, I want to pinch-to-zoom.
tests: Unit test: viewport config has userScalable !== false
Manual test: mobile pinch-to-zoom works

userStories.title: Extract chat tab skeleton to shared module
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the chat tab dynamic import in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: 3 role-specific clients import from shared module
Chat tab lazy-loads for all roles
tests: Unit test: shared module exports dynamic component
E2E test: chat tab loads on gestionnaire intervention detail
E2E test: chat tab loads on locataire intervention detail
E2E test: chat tab loads on prestataire intervention detail
